BASIC_IMMUNIZATION_CODE.bi-fsme: Received basic immunization against tick-borne encephalitis.

BASIC_IMMUNIZATION_CODE.bi-hpv: Received basic immunization against Human papillomavirus.
BASIC_IMMUNIZATION_CODE.bi-mmr: Received basic immunization against Measles, Mumps, Rubella.
BASIC_IMMUNIZATION_CODE.bi-pneumo: Received basic immunization against Pneumococcal infectious disease.
BASIC_IMMUNIZATION_CODE.bi-hepb: Received basic immunization against viral hepatitis type B.
BASIC_IMMUNIZATION_CODE.bi-hepa: Received basic immunization against viral hepatitis type A.
BASIC_IMMUNIZATION_CODE.bi-herpzos: Received basic immunization against herpes zoster.
BASIC_IMMUNIZATION_CODE.bi-mening: Received basic immunization against meningococcal infectious disease.
